metadata.name: Bulk Edit Product Weights for Shipping

description: A logistics manager realizes the weights for an entire product line were entered incorrectly, affecting shipping cost calculations. They need to perform a bulk update.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all products within a specific category or brand.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves all products from 'Brand Y'.

nodes.task_description: Export the product list with SKUs and current weights to a CSV file.
After the manager corrects the weights in the CSV, import the file to bulk update the product information.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully imports the corrected data, updating the weights for all products in the list.
